data.title: Hello, world from Astro
data.excerpt: A blog post stored as a JSON file in @webhouse/cms and rendered by an Astro page.
data.content:
## The setup

This post lives at `content/posts/hello-world.json`. **Astro reads it directly** via the `WebhouseReader` class in `src/lib/webhouse.ts` — no API calls, no database.

## Astro is a perfect fit

Astro's content-first philosophy aligns precisely with @webhouse/cms. Both believe content should be portable, readable, and version-controlled. The reader uses Node fs APIs and runs in Astro's SSR context.

## What you can edit

Open CMS admin and point it at this folder. Edit the title above. Save. Reload this page. The change is live.
data.author: Christian Broberg
